value.stringValue: No valid exchange rate is found

assignments.name: Remove_Room_Revenue_from_Original_Bucket
assignments.label: Remove Room Revenue from Original Bucket

assignments.name: Save_Original_Bucket_to_String_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Original Bucket to String Variable

assignments.name: Save_Original_Bucket_to_the_Variable
assignments.label: Save Original Bucket to the Variable

decisions.name: Check_If_Room_Is_Included_In_Output
decisions.label: Check If Room Is Included In Output

decisions.name: Check_if_Stay_Match_Reward_Night_Rule
decisions.label: Check if Stay Match Reward Night Rule

decisions.name: Check_ISO_Code_And_Check_in_Date
decisions.label: Check ISO Code And Check-in Date

Flow.description: Stay Requalification process 1. USD Conversion 2. Qualification

formulas.name: FD_TotalNonQRevenue
FD_TotalNonQRevenueUSD
FD_TotalQRevenue
formulas.expression:
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue01") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenue__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue02"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue02") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenue__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue03"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue03") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenue__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue04"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue04") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenue__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue05"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue05") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenue__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue06"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue06") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue07") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue08"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue08") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue09"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue09") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeNonRevenueIncludesTax__c}, 0 )

formulas.name: FD_TotalQRevenueUSD
formulas.expression:
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue01") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue02"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue02") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue03"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue03") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue04"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue04") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue05"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue05") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue06"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue06") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevUSD__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue07") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevUSD__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue08"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue08") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) +
IF( OR( INCLUDES({!OriginalBucketWithoutRoom}, "IHG_RQRevenue09"), INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue09") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeNonRevIncludesTaxUSD__c}, 0 )

formulas.description: Total Non Q Revenue for the Force Qualified path
formulas.name: FQ_TotalNonQRevenue

formulas.description: Total Non Q Revenue USD for the Force Qualified path
formulas.name: FQ_TotalNonQRevenueUSD

formulas.description: Total Q Revenue for the Force Qualified path
formulas.name: FQ_TotalQRevenue
formulas.expression: IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue01") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenue__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue02"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue02") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenue__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue03"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue03") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenue__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue04"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue04") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenue__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue05"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue05") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenue__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue06"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue06") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue07") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue08"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue08") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue09"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue09") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeNonRevenueIncludesTax__c}, 0 )

formulas.description: Total Q Revenue for the Force Qualified path
formulas.name: FQ_TotalQRevenueUSD
formulas.expression: IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue01") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue02"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue02") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue03"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue03") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue04"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue04") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue05"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue05") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue06"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue06") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevUSD__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue07") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevUSD__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue08"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue08") ), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenueUSD__c}, 0 ) + IF( OR( INCLUDES({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue09"), INCLUDES({!$Record.RevenueBucketQualifiedOrig__c}, "IHG_RQRevenue09") ), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeNonRevIncludesTaxUSD__c}, 0 )

formulas.name: TotalNonQRevenue
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenue__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue02"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenue__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue03"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenue__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue04"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenue__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue05"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenue__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue06"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevenue__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevenue__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue08"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenue__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue09"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeNonRevenueIncludesTax__c})

formulas.name: TotalNonQRevenueUSD
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenueUSD__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue02"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenueUSD__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue03"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenueUSD__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue04"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenueUSD__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue05"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenueUSD__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue06"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevUSD__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevUSD__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue08"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenueUSD__c}) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue09"), 0, {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeNonRevIncludesTaxUSD__c})

formulas.name: TotalQRevenue
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue02"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue03"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue04"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue05"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue06"), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue08"), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenue__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue09"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeNonRevenueIncludesTax__c}, 0)

formulas.description: Total Q Revenue based on Original bucket value
formulas.name: TotalQRevenueOrig
TotalQRevenueUSD
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue01"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeRoomRevenueUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue02"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeFoodRevenueUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue03"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeBeverageRevenueUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue04"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeTelephoneRevenueUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue05"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeMeetingBanquetRevenueUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue06"), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousMandatoryLoyaltyRevUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue07"), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousOtherLoyaltyRevUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue08"), {!$Record.LOY_MiscellaneousNoLoyaltyRevenueUSD__c}, 0) + IF(INCLUDES({!RevenueQualifiedBucket}, "IHG_RQRevenue09"), {!$Record.LOY_CumulativeNonRevIncludesTaxUSD__c}, 0)

Flow.label: Stay Requalification RT

recordCreates.description: Create a Platform Event to notify the LWC component after the flow is completed
recordCreates.name: Notify_Component
recordCreates.label: Notify Component

recordLookups.name: Get_Updated_Result_And_Reasons
recordLookups.label: Get Updated Result, Reasons and Room Rev Q Result

start.filterFormula: OR( AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.LPUStatus__c}), ISPICKVAL({!$Record__Prior.LPUStatus__c}, "Pending"), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LPUStatus__c}, "Updated"), OR( ISCHANGED({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.LOY_TotalRevenue__c}) ) ), AND( OR( ISCHANGED({!$Record.LOY_RevenueBucketQualified__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.LOY_TotalRevenue__c}) ), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LPUStatus__c}, "Updated") ) )

variables.description: Original Bucket value without Room Revenue
variables.name: OriginalBucketWithoutRoom
